decision: Initialize decision log
reason: Create persistent decision memory for agent workflow
impact: Improves traceability

decision: Adopt feature-oriented backend packages under main/features
reason: Prevent monolithic file growth and align code layout with PMO functional domains
impact: Improves maintainability, team parallelism, and roadmap scalability

decision: Keep legacy API endpoints while introducing /api/pmo/* scaffold routes
reason: Avoid frontend breakage during incremental migration
impact: Safe transition path with backward compatibility

decision: Mirror backend feature domains in frontend under features/pmo/modules/*
reason: Keep frontend and backend architecture isomorphic for maintainability and team scaling
impact: Reduces coupling and avoids oversized UI/API files

decision: Introduce authGet/authPost in api store as shared transport contract
reason: Standardize authenticated requests across all PMO feature modules
impact: Consistent API integration pattern and lower duplication

decision: Track roadmap as machine-readable task graph in repository
reason: Need deterministic source for auto-creating Bitrix24 tasks and dependency links
impact: Enables repeatable roadmap publication and status sync across chats

decision: Implement Bitrix24 sync CLI with dry-run default
reason: Prevent accidental writes and allow validation before applying to production project board
impact: Safer operations and easier onboarding for roadmap automation

decision: Use default RESPONSIBLE_ID=1 for roadmap publication
reason: Portal rejects task creation without assignee and explicit responsible IDs were not provided per-task
impact: Enabled successful creation of all roadmap tasks in Bitrix24 project

decision: Persist Bitrix task mapping in repository context
reason: Need deterministic key->task ID map for subsequent automated status updates
impact: Supports continuous repo-to-Bitrix execution tracking

decision: Duplicate epic identifiers in Bitrix task tags
reason: Need fast filtering/grouping by epic in board views
impact: Improved operational visibility without changing task graph

decision: Execute only RD-001 and pause subsequent tasks
reason: User requested to review outcomes after first stage before continuing
impact: Controlled rollout and early feedback loop

decision: Make VPS deploy synchronization check mandatory after every push
reason: Autodeploy can silently stop when VPS working tree becomes dirty or diverges from origin
impact: Prevents drift between repository state and production runtime

decision: Drive Bitrix24 kanban movement from live stage metadata fetched via webhook
reason: Portal may use custom stage IDs and empty SYSTEM_TYPE for non-default columns
impact: Status transitions now reliably move cards visually in the real kanban board

decision: Enforce task naming and description conventions in automation
reason: Need consistent human-readable titles and Russian descriptions for project operations
impact: Improved board readability and standardized execution artifacts

decision: Define RD-002 baseline quality checks as script-first with CI reuse
reason: Need deterministic minimal checks runnable locally and in GitHub Actions
impact: Reduced drift between local validation and CI execution

decision: Allow frontend lint skip when pnpm is absent locally
reason: Developer environment may not always have Node toolchain while CI has deterministic setup
impact: Local checks remain usable while CI enforces full baseline

decision: Introduce dedicated RD-105 for V1 installation success milestone
reason: Existing roadmap did not explicitly track the requested installer+settings deliverable
impact: Made V1 scope explicit and traceable in both repository and Bitrix24

decision: Add RD-106 for V2 creation after V1 approval
reason: User requested explicit version transition workflow after V1 completion
impact: Versioning step is now planned, visible, and dependency-bound in roadmap

decision: Adopt epic-root task model in Bitrix24 with roadmap tasks as subtasks
reason: Need visually clear board structure for users with explicit epic ownership
impact: Improves planning readability and navigation in task board

decision: Keep gantt dependencies and parent hierarchy simultaneously with conflict fallback
reason: Bitrix24 rejects parent links that introduce dependency cycles
impact: Automation remains robust while preserving maximal hierarchy coverage

decision: Add hierarchical numbering to Bitrix24 subtask titles
reason: User requested more readable visual structure like 2/2.1/2.2 on board
impact: Improved operability and visual traceability in kanban and task lists
